summary: RBAC multi-step restructure testing for super_admin role. All core features verified: sidebar nav, settings redirect, admin/settings page, team page EDIT/DELETE buttons, role management tab, engagement/validate, tasks/new, and departments pages.

integration_issues.issue: Intentional redirect: super_admin navigating to /engagement/submit is redirected to /engagement/validate (by design — only workers can submit). Not a bug; noted for clarity.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All RBAC changes verified for super_admin role. Worker (worker_standard, worker_isolated) RBAC sidebar testing still pending — no worker accounts exist in DB. To test worker sidebar: create worker_standard and worker_isolated users via Team > Invite Member flow. /engagement/submit is a worker-only page by design. Sidebar for super_admin confirmed: Dashboard, Analytics, Team, Departments, Settings (→/admin/settings), ENGAGEMENT (Validate Queue, Categories, Eng. Settings), ADMIN (Accounting). 4 total members exist: Admin User (super_admin), Deogratius Madalle (admin), Kalikawa MBONGO (social_team), ZTV Accountant (accountant).

test_results_detail.sidebar_nav_super_admin: PASS — Dashboard, Analytics, Team, Departments, Settings, Engagement section, Admin section all visible
test_results_detail.admin_settings_loads: PASS — Role Management, Departments, System Status, Engagement tabs load
test_results_detail.role_management_tab_rbac: PASS — EDIT button shown for ADMIN, SOCIAL_TEAM, ACCOUNTANT rows; no EDIT for super_admin self row
test_results_detail.team_page_edit_delete_buttons: PASS — 3 EDIT + 3 DEL buttons visible for non-self rows; super_admin (self) row has no buttons
test_results_detail.delete_button_inline_confirm_cancel: PASS — CONFIRM/CANCEL shown inline on DEL click
test_results_detail.edit_button_opens_modal: PASS — RoleEditorModal opens with member details
test_results_detail.engagement_submit_page: NOTE — super_admin redirected to /engagement/validate (expected by design)
test_results_detail.departments_page: PASS — /departments loads with Script, Voice, Editing, Publishing departments
